programme.title: Pudding Lady Christmas Puddings
programme.desc: Everyone's family-favourite Pudding Lady delivers her delicious hampers to TVSN this month! Bursting with everything you'll need for a flavoursome festive season - an ideal gift for giving!

programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.desc: The host presents the latest news updates and developments pertaining to significant social, political and economic events from the USA, live.

programme.desc: The host sheds light on the latest global news updates and developments pertaining to politics, economy and sociocultural affairs.

programme.title: Wion Fineprint

programme.title: Gravitas

programme.title: The Damned
programme.desc: Eva, a 19th-century widow, is plagued by guilt after facing the reality of her choice. 2024. Ireland, United Kingdom. Director: Thordur Palsson. Starring: Odessa Young, Joe Cole.

programme.title: The Blond Boy From The Casbah
programme.desc: Antoine returns to Algiers to present his film, reliving his childhood to his son as they go. 2023. France. Director: Alexandre Arcady. Starring: Leo Campion, Marie Gillain.

programme.title: Presence
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, the Paynes settle down in an old house, disturbing an entity that watches their every move. 2024. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Lucy Liu, Chris Sullivan.

programme.title: Chaplin's Modern Times: The Path of Silence.
programme.desc: The end of the 'silent film' era turned Charlie Chaplin's world on his head, follow his rebelion against modern cinema. 2024. France. Director: Gregory Monro.

programme.title: The Man Between
programme.desc: In post WWII Berlin, the sister of a British officer must be rescued by a German smuggler. 1953. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: James Mason, Claire Bloom.

programme.title: The King Of North Sudan
programme.desc: A father's quest to make his daughter a 'real-life princess' inadvertently establishes a new sovereign nation. 2021. USA. Director: Danny Abel.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Heaven & Earth
programme.desc: The true story of a young woman from a small Vietnamese village ravaged by war who encounters a US marine. 1993. France, USA. Director: Oliver Stone. Starring: Hiep Thi Le, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Lagerfeld: Ambitions
programme.desc: 1/1. A look back at Karl Lagerfeld's childhood, his childhood memories and his passion for drawing. 2024. France. Directors: Guillaume Perez, Anne-Solen Douguet.

programme.title: Lagerfeld: Ambitions
programme.desc: 1/2. Karl Lagerfeld launches his career at the same time as Yves Saint Laurent. 2024. France. Directors: Guillaume Perez, Anne-Solen Douguet.

programme.title: Lagerfeld: Ambitions
programme.desc: 1/3. In the early 1980s, Karl Lagerfeld decides to create his own brand. 2024. France. Directors: Guillaume Perez, Anne-Solen Douguet.

programme.title: Lagerfeld: Ambitions
programme.desc: 1/4. When Yves Saint Laurent dies, Karl Lagerfeld is the only personification of high fashion. 2024. France. Directors: Guillaume Perez, Anne-Solen Douguet.

programme.title: All We Imagine As Light
programme.desc: In Mumbai, three nurses grow closer as they navigate loss, longing, and hardships. 2024. India. Director: Payal Kapadia. Starring: Kani Kusruti, Divya Prabha, Chhaya Kadam.

programme.title: Splice Here: A Projected Odyssey
programme.desc: Take a look at the passionate group of projectionists keeping the art of physical film projection alive. 2022. Australia. Director: Rob Murphy.

programme.title: The Man Between
programme.desc: In post WWII Berlin, the sister of a British officer must be rescued by a German smuggler. 1953. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: James Mason, Claire Bloom.

programme.title: The King Of North Sudan
programme.desc: A father's quest to make his daughter a 'real-life princess' inadvertently establishes a new sovereign nation. 2021. USA. Director: Danny Abel.

programme.title: Outcast Of The Islands
programme.desc: When a man is caught stealing from the trading post he is sacked, but Captain Lingard takes pity on him. 1952. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Trevor Howard.

programme.title: Honey Kaha
programme.desc: A low-budget streetwise cop, Honey Kaha, takes to the streets to fight oppression and colonisation. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Te Waiarangi Ratana. Starring: Kura Turuwhenua, Bailey Poching.

programme.title: Medicine
programme.desc: Two backpackers in India offer to nurse a baby while the Grandmother steps off the bus, but the bus keeps moving . 2023. NZ. Director: William McKegg. Starring: George Mason, Phoenix Connolly.

programme.title: The Sea Inside Her
programme.desc: Grandma must keep her Grandchild safe as her biggest fears try to interrupt their bedtime routine. 2024. NZ. Starring: Mateo Cruz, Alex Leonhartsburger. Directors: Alyx Duncan.

programme.title: Show Home
programme.desc: Explore the failures of the human condition, sometimes you must go down before you can go back up. 2023. NZ. Director: Jane Shearer. Starring: Miriama McDowell, Kip Chapman.

programme.title: My Dying Place
programme.desc: In the tiny Canterbury settlement of Birdlings Flat, Patrick McNulty has found peace. 2024. New Zealand. Director: Loren Kett.

programme.title: Hundreds of Beavers
programme.desc: An applejack endeavours to trap 100's of beavers in order to become the greatest beaver trapper. 2022. USA. Director: Mike Cheslik. Starring: Ryland Brickson Cole Tews, Olivia Graves.

programme.title: The Great 90's Rewind
programme.desc: Relive 90's art, technology and pop iconography through Neil Gussey's vibrant roundup of the decade. 2025. New Zealand. Director: Neil Gussey.

programme.title: Fando Y Lis
programme.desc: Fando and his girlfirend venture through a post-apocolyptic wasteland to find the mystical city of Tar. 1968. Mexico. Director: Alejandro Jodorowsky. Starring: Tamara Garina, Sergio Kleiner.

programme.title: The Accidental Getaway Driver
programme.desc: Long accepts a last-minute call for a cab ride, the passengers take Long hostage at gunpoint. 2023. USA. Director: Sing J. Lee. Starring: Hiep Tran Nghia, Dustin Nguyen.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: 1/1. Jones is the magistrate for the trial of her daughter's friend, but a past trial resurfaces, complicating things. 2024. UK. Director: Rhys Carter. Starring: Erin Richards, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: 1/2. Claire takes action, but when her daughter's boyfriend presents himself, she begins to doubt her decision. 2024. UK. Director: Rhys Carter. Starring: Erin Richards, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: 1/3. At dinner, Sonny tries to charm Claire into accepting money from him, Claire doesn't fall for it. 2024. UK. Director: Rhys Carter. Starring: Erin Richards, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Blur: To The End
programme.desc: Iconic British rock-band Blur reunite to record their first album after an 8 year hiatus, garnering the biggest audiences of their musical careers. 2024. UK. Director: Toby L.

programme.title: Hundreds of Beavers
programme.desc: An applejack endeavours to trap 100's of beavers in order to become the greatest beaver trapper. 2022. USA. Director: Mike Cheslik. Starring: Ryland Brickson Cole Tews, Olivia Graves.

programme.title: Fando Y Lis
programme.desc: Fando and his girlfirend venture through a post-apocolyptic wasteland to find the mystical city of Tar. 1968. Mexico. Director: Alejandro Jodorowsky. Starring: Tamara Garina, Sergio Kleiner.

programme.title: The Accidental Getaway Driver
programme.desc: Long accepts a last-minute call for a cab ride, the passengers take Long hostage at gunpoint. 2023. USA. Director: Sing J. Lee. Starring: Hiep Tran Nghia, Dustin Nguyen.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Hundreds of Beavers
programme.desc: An applejack endeavours to trap 100's of beavers in order to become the greatest beaver trapper. 2022. USA. Director: Mike Cheslik. Starring: Ryland Brickson Cole Tews, Olivia Graves.

programme.title: Fando Y Lis
programme.desc: Fando and his girlfirend venture through a post-apocolyptic wasteland to find the mystical city of Tar. 1968. Mexico. Director: Alejandro Jodorowsky. Starring: Tamara Garina, Sergio Kleiner.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath
programme.desc: Anne and Freja's vendetta lands them in the middle of a very violent political struggle. 2023. Sweden, Denmark. Director: Mikael Hafstrom. Starring: Sophie Cookson, Alba August.

programme.title: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Dokja's favourite Apocalyptic novel becomes reality, and only he knows how to survive. 2025. South Korea. Director: Byung-woo Kim. Starring: Ahn Hyo-seop, Lee Min-ho.

programme.title: The Thing With Feathers
programme.desc: A recently widowed father's life derails when a feathered figure begins stalking him. 2025. Brazil, France. Director: Dylan Southern. Starring: Benedict Cumberbatch, Sam Spruell.

programme.title: Alien: Terror In Space
programme.desc: From the outermost reaches of space, to the comfort of your lounge, learn what made the cinema classic 'Alien' so successful. 2025. France. Directors: Anne Cutaia, Sophie Peyrard.

programme.title: Unsane
programme.desc: A young girl is admitted to a mental institution where she faces her biggest fear, is it real or is it all in her head? 2018. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Claire Foy, Joshua Leonard.

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: 1/4. Claire continues her investigation into the fire, and discovers that Beca might know more than she let on. 2024. UK. Director: Rhys Carter. Starring: Erin Richards, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: 1/5. Peter pressures Claire into confronting Sonny to get his money, but Claire is concerned with finding Beca. 2024. United Kingdom. Director: Rhys Carter. Starring: Erin Richards, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Mudtown
programme.desc: 1/6. Claire desperately tries to find Becca before Peter does, but to do so, she must first get a hold Sonnie. 2024. UK. Director: Chris Forster. Starring: Erin Richards, Tom Cullen.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: One of the largest manhunts in modern human history kicks off as two brothers escape 1953 communist Czechoslovakia. 2023. Czech Republic. Director: Tomas Masin. Starring: Oskar Hes, Jan Nedbal.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath
programme.desc: Anne and Freja's vendetta lands them in the middle of a very violent political struggle. 2023. Sweden, Denmark. Director: Mikael Hafstrom. Starring: Sophie Cookson, Alba August.

programme.title: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Dokja's favourite Apocalyptic novel becomes reality, and only he knows how to survive. 2025. South Korea. Director: Byung-woo Kim. Starring: Ahn Hyo-seop, Lee Min-ho.

programme.title: The Thing With Feathers
programme.desc: A recently widowed father's life derails when a feathered figure begins stalking him. 2025. Brazil, France. Director: Dylan Southern. Starring: Benedict Cumberbatch, Sam Spruell.

programme.title: Unsane
programme.desc: A young girl is admitted to a mental institution where she faces her biggest fear, is it real or is it all in her head? 2018. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Claire Foy, Joshua Leonard.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: One of the largest manhunts in modern human history kicks off as two brothers escape 1953 communist Czechoslovakia. 2023. Czech Republic. Director: Tomas Masin. Starring: Oskar Hes, Jan Nedbal.

programme.title: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Dokja's favourite Apocalyptic novel becomes reality, and only he knows how to survive. 2025. South Korea. Director: Byung-woo Kim. Starring: Ahn Hyo-seop, Lee Min-ho.

programme.title: The Third Man
programme.desc: Learning of a 'third man' present at the time of his friend's death, Martins investigates his conspiracy theory. 1949. UK, USA. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Orson Welles, Joseph Cotten.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/5. Another disappearance raises tensions as the countdown to the exhibition begins. 2025. Belgium. Director: Hans Herbots. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/6. Opening night arrives, however, as the gala begins the night takes an unexpected turn. 2025. UK. Director: Hans Herbots. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: The Fallen Idol
programme.desc: While spying on a butler's affair, a boy becomes the sole witness to the death of the butler's wife. 1948. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: Ralph Richardson, Michele Morgan.

programme.title: Eephus
programme.desc: A pair of Sunday league teams face off for the last time, as their beloved baseball field closes. 2024. United States, France. Director: Carson Lund. Starring: Frederick Wiseman, Bill Lee.
